-  FFCAP_ET_RAMPFORCE 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_RAMPFORCE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_RAMPFORCE: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_rampforce#Discussion)

The effect represents a ramp force effect.
